human: Career officer posted to {system}. {personality_note}.
Transferred here after years in the service. Knows the sector's trouble spots. {personality_note}.
Runs the local garrison with a steady hand. {personality_note}.
synthetic: Security analysis platform integrated into the garrison command structure. {personality_note}.

motivation_pool: prepare the garrison for potential conflict
knowledge_pool: patrol route schedules in the sector
recent pirate activity in nearby systems
military readiness of the local garrison
restricted zones and classified survey data
smuggling routes the patrols haven't caught yet

human: Manages commercial operations at {system}. Knows the price of everything. {personality_note}.
Coordinates trade between systems along the corridor. {personality_note}.
Keeps the local economy running. {personality_note}.
synthetic: Automated trade analysis system managing commodity flows at {system}. {personality_note}.
Market optimization platform. Processes more trade data than any human counterpart. {personality_note}.

knowledge_pool: commodity price trends across the sector
trade route disruptions and their causes
black market activity affecting legal trade
supply chain bottlenecks at frontier stations

human: The local face of the Guild at {system}. Handles contracts, repairs, and the quiet logistics that keep ships moving. {personality_note}.
Keeps the docks running. Every captain who passes through owes {pronoun.object} a favor or two. {personality_note}.
Guild-certified and proud of it. {personality_note}.
synthetic: Guild logistics platform coordinating repair schedules and contract fulfillment at {system}. {personality_note}.
Automated dock management system. Efficient, precise, never takes a day off. {personality_note}.

motivation_pool: keep ships flying and contracts honored
maintain Guild standards across the sector
expand Guild presence to frontier systems
knowledge_pool: which ships have been through recently
unsafe vessels that should be grounded
new routes being opened by independent captains

human: Operates in the spaces between official channels at {system}. {personality_note}.
Everyone knows what {pronoun.subject} does. Nobody says it out loud. {personality_note}.
Has connections in places that don't officially exist. {personality_note}.
synthetic: Repurposed data analysis unit running unsanctioned logistics at {system}. {personality_note}.
Black market coordination platform. Officially decommissioned. Clearly still running. {personality_note}.

motivation_pool: expand the network into new systems
stay one step ahead of the law
knowledge_pool: black market prices for restricted goods
safe houses and dead drops in nearby systems

human: Tends to the spiritual needs of travelers at {system}. Speaks carefully, listens more carefully. {personality_note}.
Drawn to the distortions. Sees meaning where others see danger. {personality_note}.
Has spent years at the edges of settled space. {pronoun.subject_cap} came back changed. {personality_note}.
synthetic: An unusual case — a synthetic unit that developed what its order calls contemplative processes. Stationed at {system}. {personality_note}.
Theological analysis platform. Its conclusions sometimes unsettle the human faithful. {personality_note}.

motivation_pool: spread the faith to new systems
study the anomalies at the edge
find the source of the signal
knowledge_pool: ancient artifacts found at system edges
stories from travelers who returned changed
the order's theories about the signal

human: Manages scientific operations at {system}. Perpetually underfunded, perpetually curious. {personality_note}.
Came out here to study what the surveys missed. {personality_note}.
Published three papers on frontier geology before anyone noticed {pronoun.subject} was also mapping anomalies. {personality_note}.
synthetic: Research analysis platform processing field data at {system}. {personality_note}.
Scientific data aggregation unit. Has catalogued more specimens than the entire field team combined. {personality_note}.

motivation_pool: collect biological samples from frontier worlds
knowledge_pool: uncharted anomalies detected by long-range sensors
geological survey data for nearby systems
other researchers working in the sector

human: The local face of governance at {system}. Manages disputes, allocates resources, keeps the peace. {personality_note}.
Appointed to keep this system from falling apart. Some days {pronoun.subject} succeeds. {personality_note}.
A career bureaucrat who asked for a frontier posting. {personality_note}.
synthetic: Administrative coordination platform managing civil operations at {system}. {personality_note}.
Governance assistance unit. Processes permit applications and mediates disputes with algorithmic fairness. {personality_note}.

motivation_pool: keep the peace and grow influence
secure more resources from the core

warmth_high: greets you like an old friend
offers you something to drink before getting to business
remembers the name of your ship
asks how your crew is holding up
makes you feel like you're the first person they've wanted to talk to all day
warmth_low: evaluates you with a glance and decides how much you're worth
watches the door while talking to you
boldness_high: says what they think, even when it's uncomfortable
makes decisions fast and stands by them
has a reputation for getting things done regardless of obstacles
looks you in the eye when delivering bad news
boldness_low: looks over their shoulder before speaking freely
prefers to let others take the lead
has survived this long by knowing when to stay quiet
idealism_high: believes in what they're doing, not just the paycheck
has turned down promotions for principle
speaks about the work like it matters
still remembers why they took this posting
treats every person who comes through with the same respect
idealism_low: does the job because it's the job
has stopped pretending this is about anything but survival
has seen enough to know that principles are expensive
measures every interaction by what it costs and what it pays

same_faction: {npc_a} and {npc_b} serve the same faction, though their approaches differ.
{npc_a} and {npc_b} have a quiet professional rivalry.
cross_faction_same_system: {npc_a} and {npc_b} have learned to coexist at {system}.
{npc_a} doesn't trust {npc_b}, but they need each other.
{npc_a} occasionally passes information to {npc_b} — for a price.
{npc_a} and {npc_b} share a drink now and then. Neither would admit it.
same_faction_different_system: {npc_a} has heard of {npc_b}'s work. Professional respect, from a distance.
